description: ID2 (Von Neumann) — The Statistical AI Computer. Integer-only arithmetic, FLOPs→IOPs, FAT, EGPTMath as the working proof that von Neumann's vision is buildable.
header:
# EGPT — ID2: Von Neumann's Idea (The Statistical AI Computer)

> An ultra-efficient computer operates statistically, not arithmetically.
> This file contains all primary artifacts for Idea #2.
> For the full framework: https://eabadir.github.io/EGPT/IDEAS.md
>
> Key claim: Integer-only arithmetic (IOPs) replaces floating-point (FLOPs) with zero error accumulation.
> Von Neumann diagnosed this in 'The Computer and the Brain' (1958, posthumous).
> EGPTMath and FAT are the working implementations of his vision.
> Live benchmark: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1LQLCHDNp9kCFgJXIzlitaVxuYiHRATXm

files.note: Integer-only vector algebra engine (~6800 lines, 157 tests)
PPF number representation — the statistical notation von Neumann envisioned
How unlimited precision works in information space
P_eq_NP — why statistical computation = deterministic computation
AI is Monte Carlo in disguise
FLOPs vs IOPs — the historical argument
FRAQTL: classical QFT at O((log k)^3)
